_doc: Audit 2026-07-03 A5 — FROZEN button/modal class-family allowlist. New UI must use the canonical .av-button / .av-modal primitives; introducing a NEW *-btn/*-button/*-modal namespace fails primitive-families.test.mjs. This freezes the current fragmentation so it can only shrink. When a legacy family is fully migrated to .av-* and removed, delete its entry here.
